FirebaseProvider.auth/weak-password: Password is too weak. It must be at least 8 characters long.
FirebaseProvider.auth/operation-not-allowed: This authentication method is not allowed.
FirebaseProvider.auth/network-request-failed: A network error occurred. Please check your connection.
FirebaseProvider.auth/internal-error: An internal error occurred. Please try again later.
FirebaseProvider.auth/invalid-user-token: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
FirebaseProvider.auth/user-token-expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
FirebaseProvider.auth/quota-exceeded: Email quota exceeded. Please try again later.
FirebaseProvider.auth/unauthorized-domain: This domain is not authorized for authentication.
FirebaseProvider.auth/app-not-authorized: This app is not authorized to use authentication.
FirebaseProvider.auth/admin-restricted-operation: This operation is restricted to administrators only.
FirebaseProvider.auth/invalid-verification-code: The code is incorrect. Please try again.

FirebaseProvider.auth/invalid-multi-factor-session: Session is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
FirebaseProvider.auth/invalid-phone-number: Invalid phone number format: Must be in E.164 format.
FirebaseProvider.auth/requires-recent-login: Please log out and sign in again before trying.
